HERMITMOD-DEAD_ON.title: Dead On
HERMITMOD-DEAD_ON.description: Dead On cards have a bonus effect when in the middle of your hand.
HERMITMOD-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
HERMITMOD-CONCENTRATE.description: The next Dead On card played while Concentrated triggers its effect regardless of position. Wears off on turn end.
HERMITMOD-BRUISE.title: Bruise
HERMITMOD-BRUISE.description: Bruised targets take more attack damage. Wears off on turn end.
HERMITMOD-RUGGED.title: Rugged
HERMITMOD-RUGGED.description: Reduces next instance of attack damage taken to 2.
HERMITMOD-BOUNTY.title: Bounty
HERMITMOD-BOUNTY.description: Normal Enemy: 15 gold. Elite Enemy: 40 gold. Boss: 100 gold.
HERMITMOD-STUN.title: Stun
